title: 5-Day Serengeti & Ngorongoro Safari
body: Northern-circuit safari covering Serengeti and Ngorongoro Crater. Game drives daily, full-board lodging, professional guide. Suitable for most fitness levels.

title: 3-Day Tarangire & Manyara
body: Short getaway to Tarangire (elephants, baobabs) and Lake Manyara. Ideal for a first safari or a weekend.

title: Kilimanjaro Machame Route
body: 7-day Machame ('Whiskey') route up Kilimanjaro. Good acclimatisation profile. Requires solid fitness; no technical climbing.
includes: park fees, huts/tents, meals, porters, guide

title: Day Trip: Materuni Waterfalls & Coffee Tour
body: Guided hike to Materuni waterfalls plus a traditional Chagga coffee experience. Family friendly.
